words.name: Student
words.description:
A person who is studying at a school or college.
How to sign:
1. Sign LEARN: dominant '5' hand takes knowledge from the non-dominant palm and moves it to the forehead.
2. Sign AGENT ('person'): both flat hands move straight down parallel.
words.howToSign: 1. Sign LEARN: dominant '5' hand takes knowledge from the non-dominant palm and moves it to the forehead. 2. Sign AGENT ('person'): both flat hands move straight down parallel.
